name: @freeside-worlds/config-protocol
description: Sealed schema + TS types for world surface-config (runtime-editable per-surface config, keyed by world_slug+surface). surface-config.schema.json is the contract; types.ts is its TS face (Jani's sietch Theme model ported verbatim). C-1 extraction. Validated by Ajv at the service boundary, mirroring @freeside-worlds/registry.
